---
title: "Reports"
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing.ejs
    categories: true
page-layout: full
include-back-link: false
toc-location: right
---

Technical and policy reports produced for government agencies, public funding programs, and research consortia. These pieces typically distill applied research into recommendations for non-academic audiences. {{< ai blank-just-to-add-ai-dependency-to-this-page >}}

## Policy and technical reports

:::{#articles}
:::
